auth.name: Full Name / Entity Name
auth.loginDescription: Sign in to access our certified insulation catalogue and manage your project supplies.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your registered email to reset your password securely.
auth.enterResetCode: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email
auth.successReset: Password updated successfully. You can now access your account.
auth.codeSent: Verification code has been dispatched to your email.
auth.signupSuccess: Welcome to the SkyGalaxy construction ecosystem!
auth.resetSuccess: Your account is now secured with a new password.
auth.signupDescription: Join the Kingdom's leading construction network for premium thermal and waterproofing solutions.
auth.requestDescription: Don't worry, we'll help you get back to your projects. Enter your email to begin.
auth.verifyDescription: A secure, temporary verification code has been sent to protect your account data.
auth.resetDescription: Excellent! Now set a high-entropy password that meets our security standards.
auth.secureRecoveryDescription: We employ rigorous verification protocols to ensure the safety of your procurement data.
auth.codeSentSuccessfully: Code sent to your verified email.
auth.platformDescription: An integrated platform providing precise supply chain analytics and real-time site delivery tracking.
auth.constructionDescription: Your premier destination for advanced waterproofing and thermal technologies, aligning global quality with Saudi Building Code (SBC) standards.
auth.signupConstructionDescription: Register for expert technical consultations, exclusive project-scale offers, and access to leading global insulation brands.
auth.signupPlatformDescription: Discover the next generation of construction procurement, where technology meets engineering expertise for unmatched insulation solutions.
auth.benefit1: Direct access to energy-efficient thermal insulation materials
auth.benefit2: Certified technical datasheets for every product
auth.benefit3: Flexible budget management and scheduled supply chains

branding.description: Providing integrated thermal and waterproofing solutions compliant with the Saudi Building Code, ensuring faster supply and superior structural safety.
